content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "在便利商店請店員幫忙",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不好意思，我的手機壞掉了，可以幫我嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yìsi, wǒ de shǒujī huài diào le, kěyǐ bāng wǒ ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, wo3 de5 shou3 ji1 huai4 diao4 le5, ke3 yi3 bang1 wo3 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, my phone is broken. Can you help me?",
          "translation_ko": "죄송합니다. 제 휴대폰이 고장 났는데, 도와주실 수 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "沒問題，請問你需要什麼幫忙？",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí, qǐng wèn nǐ xūyào shénme bāngmáng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "mei2 wen4 ti2, qing3 wen4 ni3 xu1 yao4 shen2 me5 bang1 mang2?",
          "translation_en": "No problem. What help do you need?",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮습니다. 어떤 도움이 필요하신가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我想打電話給朋友，可是手機故障了。可以借電話嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xiǎng dǎ diànhuà gěi péngyou, kěshì shǒujī gùzhàng le. Kěyǐ jiè diànhuà ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 xiang3 da3 dian4 hua4 gei3 peng2 you5, ke3 shi4 shou3 ji1 gu4 zhang4 le5. ke3 yi3 jie4 dian4 hua4 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "I want to call my friend, but my phone is broken. Can I borrow a phone?",
          "translation_ko": "친구에게 전화를 하고 싶은데 휴대폰이 고장 났어요. 전화를 빌릴 수 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "可以，這裡有電話。請告訴我號碼。",
          "pinyin": "Kěyǐ, zhèlǐ yǒu diànhuà. Qǐng gàosu wǒ hàomǎ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "ke3 yi3, zhe4 li3 you3 dian4 hua4. qing3 gao4 su5 wo3 hao4 ma3.",
          "translation_en": "Sure, there's a phone here. Please tell me the number.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 여기에 전화기가 있습니다. 번호를 알려주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "謝謝！號碼是零九一二三四五六七八。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie! Hàomǎ shì líng jiǔ yī èr sān sì wǔ liù qī bā.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "xie4 xie5! hao4 ma3 shi4 ling2 jiu3 yi1 er4 san1 si4 wu3 liu4 qi1 ba1.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you! The number is 0912-345-678.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다! 번호는 0912-345-678입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，請等一下。我幫你打。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, qǐng děng yīxià. Wǒ bāng nǐ dǎ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "hao3 de5, qing3 deng3 yi1 xia4. wo3 bang1 ni3 da3.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, please wait a moment. I'll call for you.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 잠시만 기다려 주세요. 제가 전화를 걸어 드릴게요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "麻煩你了，謝謝！",
          "pinyin": "Máfan nǐ le, xièxie!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "ma2 fan5 ni3 le5, xie4 xie5!",
          "translation_en": "I'm troubling you, thank you!",
          "translation_ko": "번거롭게 해드려 죄송합니다. 감사합니다!"
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What is the customer's problem?",
          "question_ko": "손님의 문제는 무엇인가요?",
          "options_en": ["Phone is broken", "Lost wallet", "Need directions"],
          "options_ko": ["휴대폰 고장", "지갑 분실", "길 찾기 필요"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after the speaker, focusing on the polite tone and the phrase '可以幫我嗎'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Imagine your phone is broken and you need to call a friend. Practice asking a store staff for help in Chinese."
    },
    {
      "title": "打電話給朋友求助",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "喂，小明嗎？我現在需要幫忙。",
          "pinyin": "Wèi, Xiǎo Míng ma? Wǒ xiànzài xūyào bāngmáng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wei4, Xiao3 Ming2 ma5? wo3 xian4 zai4 xu1 yao4 bang1 mang2.",
          "translation_en": "Hello, is this Xiaoming? I need help right now.",
          "translation_ko": "여보세요, 샤오밍 씨인가요? 지금 도움이 필요해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "怎麼了？發生什麼事？",
          "pinyin": "Zěnme le? Fāshēng shénme shì?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "zen3 me5 le5? fa1 sheng1 shen2 me5 shi4?",
          "translation_en": "What's wrong? What happened?",
          "translation_ko": "왜 그래요? 무슨 일이에요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我的車子故障了，停在路邊。可以來幫我嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ de chēzi gùzhàng le, tíng zài lùbiān. Kěyǐ lái bāng wǒ ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 de5 che1 zi5 gu4 zhang4 le5, ting2 zai4 lu4 bian1. ke3 yi3 lai2 bang1 wo3 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "My car broke down and is parked on the roadside. Can you come help me?",
          "translation_ko": "차가 고장 나서 길가에 세워뒀어요. 와서 도와줄 수 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "你在哪裡？告訴我地址。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ zài nǎlǐ? Gàosu wǒ dìzhǐ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "ni3 zai4 na3 li3? gao4 su5 wo3 di4 zhi3.",
          "translation_en": "Where are you? Tell me the address.",
          "translation_ko": "어디에 있어요? 주소를 알려줘요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我在台北車站前面的大馬路。地址是忠孝西路一段五十號。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ zài Táiběi Chēzhàn qiánmiàn de dà mǎlù. Dìzhǐ shì Zhōngxiào Xīlù yī duàn wǔshí hào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 zai4 Tai2 bei3 Che1 zhan4 qian2 mian4 de5 da4 ma3 lu4. di4 zhi3 shi4 Zhong1 xiao4 Xi1 lu4 yi1 duan4 wu3 shi2 hao4.",
          "translation_en": "I'm on the main road in front of Taipei Station. The address is No. 50, Section 1, Zhongxiao West Road.",
          "translation_ko": "타이베이 역 앞 큰 길에 있어요. 주소는 중샤오시루 1단 50호예요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好，我馬上過去。你等我一下。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, wǒ mǎshàng guòqù. Nǐ děng wǒ yīxià.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "hao3, wo3 ma3 shang4 guo4 qu4. ni3 deng3 wo3 yi1 xia4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll come right away. Wait for me a moment.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아, 바로 갈게. 잠시만 기다려."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "謝謝你！麻煩你了。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie nǐ! Máfan nǐ le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "xie4 xie5 ni3! ma2 fan5 ni3 le5.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you! Sorry for the trouble.",
          "translation_ko": "고마워! 번거롭게 해서 미안해."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What problem does A have?",
          "question_ko": "A의 문제는 무엇인가요?",
          "options_en": ["Car broke down", "Lost phone", "Missed the bus"],
          "options_ko": ["차 고장", "휴대폰 분실", "버스 놓침"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line, paying attention to the urgency in the tone and the address details.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Imagine your car breaks down. Practice calling a friend to ask for help, giving your location and address."
    },
    {
      "title": "需要地址寄東西",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你好，請問你可以幫我一個忙嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn nǐ kěyǐ bāng wǒ yī ge máng ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 ni3 ke3 yi3 bang1 wo3 yi1 ge5 mang2 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, can you do me a favor?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 부탁 하나 들어주실 수 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "當然，你需要什麼幫忙？",
          "pinyin": "Dāngrán, nǐ xūyào shénme bāngmáng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "dang1 ran2, ni3 xu1 yao4 shen2 me5 bang1 mang2?",
          "translation_en": "Of course, what help do you need?",
          "translation_ko": "물론이죠, 어떤 도움이 필요하세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我想寄一封信給朋友，可是我把他的地址弄丟了。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xiǎng jì yī fēng xìn gěi péngyou, kěshì wǒ bǎ tā de dìzhǐ nòng diū le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 xiang3 ji4 yi1 feng1 xin4 gei3 peng2 you5, ke3 shi4 wo3 ba3 ta1 de5 di4 zhi3 nong4 diu1 le5.",
          "translation_en": "I want to send a letter to a friend, but I lost his address.",
          "translation_ko": "친구에게 편지를 보내고 싶은데 주소를 잃어버렸어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "沒關係，你知道他的名字嗎？我可以幫你找。",
          "pinyin": "Méi guānxi, nǐ zhīdào tā de míngzì ma? Wǒ kěyǐ bāng nǐ zhǎo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "mei2 guan1 xi5, ni3 zhi1 dao4 ta1 de5 ming2 zi4 ma5? wo3 ke3 yi3 bang1 ni3 zhao3.",
          "translation_en": "No problem, do you know his name? I can help you find it.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮아요, 그분 이름을 아세요? 제가 찾아드릴게요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "他叫王大明，住在台北。你有他的地址嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Tā jiào Wáng Dàmíng, zhù zài Táiběi. Nǐ yǒu tā de dìzhǐ ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "ta1 jiao4 Wang2 Da4 ming2, zhu4 zai4 Tai2 bei3. ni3 you3 ta1 de5 di4 zhi3 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "His name is Wang Daming, and he lives in Taipei. Do you have his address?",
          "translation_ko": "그분 이름은 왕다밍이고 타이베이에 살아요. 주소를 알고 계신가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我沒有，不過你可以打電話問他。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ méiyǒu, bùguò nǐ kěyǐ dǎ diànhuà wèn tā.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 mei2 you3, bu4 guo4 ni3 ke3 yi3 da3 dian4 hua4 wen4 ta1.",
          "translation_en": "I don't have it, but you can call and ask him.",
          "translation_ko": "없는데, 전화해서 물어보시면 돼요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "對，我應該打電話給他。謝謝你的建議！",
          "pinyin": "Duì, wǒ yīnggāi dǎ diànhuà gěi tā. Xièxie nǐ de jiànyì!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "dui4, wo3 ying1 gai1 da3 dian4 hua4 gei3 ta1. xie4 xie5 ni3 de5 jian4 yi4!",
          "translation_en": "Right, I should call him. Thanks for the suggestion!",
          "translation_ko": "맞아요, 전화해야겠어요. 조언 감사합니다!"
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did A lose?",
          "question_ko": "A는 무엇을 잃어버렸나요?",
          "options_en": ["Friend's address", "Phone number", "Letter"],
          "options_ko": ["친구 주소", "전화번호", "편지"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line, focusing on the polite request and the phrase '弄丟了'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "You need to send something to a friend but lost their address. Practice asking someone for help and suggesting a solution."
    }
  ]
}
